command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && python3 << 'PY'
import json

with open('website/data/feed.json') as f:
    feed = json.load(f)

# Keep only: the latest Nel research (220933), the Nel QA report (215516),
# the nel-test morning report, and remove all stale/duplicate/template reports
keep_ids = {
    'agent-reflection-nel-2026-04-13-220933',  # Latest real thinking report
    'agent-reflection-nel-2026-04-13-215516',  # Nel QA cycle report (real data)
    'mr-nel-test-2026-04-13',                   # Morning report (Nel test)
}

removed = []
kept = []
for r in feed['reports']:
    rid = r.get('id', '')
    if rid in keep_ids:
        kept.append(r)
    else:
        removed.append(rid)

feed['reports'] = kept

# Update history to match
for month, data in feed.get('history', {}).items():
    if 'reports' in data:
        data['reports'] = [rid for rid in data['reports'] if rid in keep_ids]

with open('website/data/feed.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(feed, f, indent=2)

print(f'Kept {len(kept)} reports, removed {len(removed)}:')
for rid in removed:
    print(f'  - {rid}')
